cocoa.en: She drank a warm cup of cocoa.
cocoa.zh: 她喝了一杯溫熱的可可。

coin.en: He dropped a coin into the box.
coin.zh: 他把一枚硬幣投進箱子裡。

cola-coke.en: I would like a glass of cola.

college.en: My sister studies at a college in Taipei.
college.zh: 我姊姊在台北的一所大學讀書。

combine.en: Combine the eggs and sugar in a bowl.

comic.en: He likes to read comic books.

command.en: The dog obeys its owner's commands.
command.zh: 那隻狗服從主人的命令。

commercial.en: A loud commercial interrupted the show.
commercial.zh: 一段吵雜的廣告打斷了節目。

company.en: My uncle works for a big company.
company.zh: 我叔叔在一家大公司工作。

compare.zh: 我們來比較這兩支手機。

complete.en: Please complete the form and sign it.

complex.en: This is a complex math problem.
complex.zh: 這是一道複雜的數學題。

concern.en: Her health is my main concern.
concern.zh: 她的健康是我最關心的事。

conclude.en: We concluded that the plan would work.
conclude.zh: 我們得出結論，這個計畫行得通。

condition.en: The car is in good condition.

confident.en: She felt confident before the test.

conflict.en: The two brothers had a conflict.

connection.en: There is a strong connection between them.
connection.zh: 他們之間有很強的連結。

consideration.en: We took your needs into consideration.
consideration.zh: 我們把你的需求納入考量。

contact.en: Please contact me if you have questions.

conversation.en: We had a long conversation on the phone.
conversation.zh: 我們在電話上聊了很久。

corn.en: The farmer grows corn in the field.

countryside.en: We spent the weekend in the countryside.
countryside.zh: 我們在鄉下度過了週末。

couple.en: The young couple just got married.

courage.en: It took courage to tell the truth.

court.en: The judge spoke in the court.

cowboy.en: The cowboy rode his horse across the field.

crayon.en: The child drew a sun with a yellow crayon.
crayon.zh: 那個小孩用黃色蠟筆畫了一個太陽。

cream.en: She put cream on top of the cake.
cream.zh: 她在蛋糕上放了鮮奶油。

create.zh: 藝術家創造美麗的事物。

crisis.en: The country faced an economic crisis.
crisis.zh: 這個國家面臨經濟危機。

crow.en: A black crow sat on the wire.
crow.zh: 一隻黑烏鴉停在電線上。

crowd.en: A large crowd gathered in the square.
crowd.zh: 一大群人聚集在廣場上。

cultural.en: The festival is a cultural event.

culture.en: I am interested in Japanese culture.

cure.en: Doctors are looking for a cure.
cure.zh: 醫生們正在尋找治療方法。

curious.en: The curious cat looked into the box.

current.en: What is the current time in London?

curtain.en: She opened the curtains to let in light.
curtain.zh: 她拉開窗簾讓光線進來。

custom.en: Taking off shoes indoors is a custom here.
custom.zh: 在這裡室內脫鞋是一種習俗。

customer.en: The shop was full of customers.

cycle.en: The water cycle includes rain and clouds.

daily.en: Brushing teeth is a daily habit.

damage.zh: 暴風雨造成了嚴重的損害。

danger.en: The sign warns of danger ahead.

data.en: The scientist collected a lot of data.
data.zh: 科學家收集了很多數據。

deaf.en: She is deaf and uses sign language.

debate.en: The students had a debate about pollution.
debate.zh: 學生們針對污染進行辯論。

debt.en: He worked hard to pay off his debt.

decision.en: It was a difficult decision to make.

deer.en: A deer ran across the road.

degree.en: The water is ninety degrees hot.

delay.en: The flight was delayed by two hours.

deliver.en: They deliver the newspaper every morning.

dentist.en: I visit the dentist twice a year.

department.en: She works in the sales department.

depth.en: The depth of the lake is ten meters.
depth.zh: 這座湖的深度是十公尺。

describe.en: Can you describe the man you saw?
describe.zh: 你能描述你看到的那個人嗎？

description.en: She gave a clear description of the place.
description.zh: 她清楚地描述了那個地方。

desert.en: Few plants grow in the dry desert.
desert.zh: 乾燥的沙漠裡幾乎沒有植物生長。

design.zh: 她設計了一件漂亮的洋裝。

detail.en: Please tell me the details of the plan.

develop.en: Children develop quickly in their first year.
develop.zh: 孩子在第一年發育得很快。

dial.en: Dial this number to reach the office.
dial.zh: 撥這個號碼可以聯絡辦公室。

dialogue.en: The two leaders began a dialogue.

diamond.en: The ring has a shiny diamond.
diamond.zh: 這枚戒指有一顆閃亮的鑽石。

diary.en: She writes in her diary every night.

diet.en: A healthy diet keeps you strong.

difference.en: There is a big difference between them.
difference.zh: 他們之間有很大的差別。

difficulty.en: He had difficulty understanding the lesson.

direct.en: Is there a direct flight to Tokyo?

direction.en: We walked in the wrong direction.

director.en: The director made a great movie.
director.zh: 那位導演拍了一部很棒的電影。

disappear.en: The sun disappeared behind the clouds.

discover.zh: 科學家發現了一顆新行星。

discuss.en: We discussed the plan after dinner.
discuss.zh: 晚餐後我們討論了這個計畫。

discussion.en: The class had a lively discussion.
discussion.zh: 全班進行了熱烈的討論。

display.en: The toys were on display in the window.

distance.en: The distance to school is two kilometers.
distance.zh: 到學校的距離是兩公里。

divide.en: Divide the cake into six pieces.

division.en: We learned division in math class.
division.zh: 我們在數學課學了除法。

domestic.en: Cats and dogs are domestic animals.

dot.en: Put a dot at the end of the line.

double.en: He ordered a double serving of rice.

doubt.en: I have no doubt that you can do it.

dove.en: A white dove is a symbol of peace.

download.en: I downloaded a new song to my phone.
download.zh: 我下載了一首新歌到手機。

dragon.en: The story is about a brave dragon.
dragon.zh: 這個故事是關於一條勇敢的龍。

drama.en: She acts in a school drama.

drawer.en: The socks are in the top drawer.
drawer.zh: 襪子在最上面的抽屜裡。

drawing.en: Her drawing of the cat is lovely.

drug.en: The doctor gave him some drugs.

dryer.en: I put the wet towels in the dryer.
dryer.zh: 我把濕毛巾放進烘乾機。

due.en: The report is due on Friday.

dull.en: The lesson was long and dull.

duty.en: It is a soldier's duty to protect people.
duty.zh: 保護人民是士兵的責任。

eagle.en: The eagle flew high in the sky.

earn.en: She earns money by teaching piano.

earring.en: She wore a pair of gold earrings.

earthquake.en: The earthquake shook the whole city.

ease.en: She solved the puzzle with ease.

eastern.en: They live in the eastern part of the country.
eastern.zh: 他們住在這個國家的東部。

edge.en: Don't stand too close to the edge.

edition.en: This is the latest edition of the book.
edition.zh: 這是這本書的最新版本。

education.zh: 教育對每個人都很重要。

effect.en: The medicine had a quick effect.

effective.en: Exercise is an effective way to stay fit.
effective.zh: 運動是保持健康的有效方法。

effort.en: She passed the exam through hard effort.

electrical.en: There was an electrical problem in the house.

emotion.en: She tried to control her emotions.
emotion.zh: 她試著控制自己的情緒。

emphasize.en: The teacher emphasized the main idea.

employ.zh: 這家工廠雇用了許多工人。

employee.zh: 這家公司有五十名員工。

employer.en: Her employer is kind and fair.
employer.zh: 她的雇主既親切又公平。

encourage.en: My parents encourage me to read.

ending.en: The movie has a happy ending.
ending.zh: 這部電影有個快樂的結局。

enemy.en: The two countries were once enemies.
enemy.zh: 這兩個國家曾經是敵人。

energy.en: Children have a lot of energy.

engine.en: The car engine made a strange noise.
engine.zh: 汽車引擎發出奇怪的聲音。

entire.en: She read the entire book in one day.
entire.zh: 她一天就讀完了整本書。

entrance.en: We met at the entrance of the mall.

environmental.en: Pollution is a serious environmental problem.
environmental.zh: 污染是嚴重的環境問題。

equal.zh: 每個人都應該有平等的權利。

escape.en: The bird escaped from its cage.
escape.zh: 那隻鳥從籠子裡逃了出來。

especially.zh: 我愛吃水果，尤其是蘋果。

essay.en: She wrote an essay about her family.
essay.zh: 她寫了一篇關於家人的文章。

eve.en: We have a party on New Year's Eve.

event.en: The sports day is a big event.

evil.en: In the story, the evil witch was defeated.
evil.zh: 在故事裡，邪惡的女巫被打敗了。

exact.en: Tell me the exact time of the meeting.
exact.zh: 告訴我會議的確切時間。

examination-exam.en: I studied hard for the examination.

examine.en: The doctor examined the sick child.
examine.zh: 醫生檢查了那個生病的孩子。

excite.en: The good news excited the whole class.
excite.zh: 這個好消息讓全班興奮。

excuse.en: Please excuse me for being late.

exist.zh: 有些人相信鬼是存在的。

existence.en: We learned about the existence of black holes.
existence.zh: 我們學到了黑洞的存在。

exit.en: Please leave by the back exit.

expense.en: Travel can be a big expense.
expense.zh: 旅行可能是一筆大開銷。

expert.en: She is an expert in computers.

express.en: He used words to express his feelings.
express.zh: 他用言語表達他的感受。

expression.en: Her face had a happy expression.
expression.zh: 她臉上帶著開心的表情。

extra.en: I need extra time to finish.
extra.zh: 我需要額外的時間完成。

eyebrow-brow.en: He raised his eyebrows in surprise.

factor.en: Price is an important factor when buying.
factor.zh: 買東西時價格是重要的因素。

fair.en: The referee made a fair decision.

false.en: Decide if the sentence is true or false.
false.zh: 判斷這個句子是對是錯。

fashion.en: She is interested in fashion and design.
fashion.zh: 她對時尚與設計有興趣。
